kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

test.name: TC14 Passenger View And Download Tax Invoice

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: การเดินทางของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยืนยันแล้ว')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ยืนยันแล้ว')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: let target = btns.find(b => b.innerText.includes("เอกสาร"));
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: เอกสารการชำระเงิน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=(//button[@title="ดูเอกสาร"])[2]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Window Handles
kw.doc: Returns all child window handles of the selected browser as a list.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.

kw.name: Switch Window
kw.doc: Switches to browser window matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Window
kw.doc: Closes currently opened and selected browser window/tab.

kw.name: Switch Window
kw.doc: Switches to browser window matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: การเดินทางของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: let target = btns.find(b => b.innerText.includes("เอกสาร"));
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: เอกสารการชำระเงิน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=(//button[@title="ดาวน์โหลด"])[2]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Element Screenshot
kw.doc: Captures a screenshot from the element identified by ``locator`` and embeds it into log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=(//button[@title="ดาวน์โหลด"])[2]' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ใบกำกับภาษีแบบย่อ'.
kw.arg: ใบกำกับภาษีแบบย่อ
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
